text:
(a) Each automobile club operating under this chapter shall furnish to the membership a service contract or membership card that includes the following information:

(1) the club’s name;

(2) the street address of the club’s home office and of its usual place of business in this state; and

(3) a description of the services or benefits to which the members are entitled.

(b) For purposes of this chapter, the completed application for an automobile club certificate of authority and the description of services listed under Subsection (a) constitute the service contract.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 722. Auto. Club Svcs.
##### § 722.009 — Service Contract; Membership Information

(a) Each automobile club operating under this chapter shall furnish to the membership a service contract or membership card that includes the following information:

    (1) the club’s name;

    (2) the street address of the club’s home office and of its usual place of business in this state; and

    (3) a description of the services or benefits to which the members are entitled.

(b) For purposes of this chapter, the completed application for an automobile club certificate of authority and the description of services listed under Subsection (a) constitute the service contract.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

the street address of the club’s home office and of its usual place of business in this state; and
a description of the services or benefits to which the members are entitled.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: For purposes of this chapter, the completed application for an automobile club certificate of authority and the description of services listed under Subsection (a) constitute the service contract.
